---
title: "Get In Touch"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


I'd love to connect! Whether you're reaching out about a job opportunity, collaboration, or just want to chat about data analytics.

::: {layout-ncol=2}

### Contact Details {.text-left}

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Ananya Mahadeva |
| **Location** | Dublin, Ireland |
| **Email** | [ananyam461@gmail.com](mailto:ananyam461@gmail.com) |
| **LinkedIn** | [View Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ananya-mahadeva/){target="_blank"} |
| **GitHub** | [View Profile](https://github.com/){target="_blank"} |

### Availability {.text-right}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Currently Open To
- Part-time retail / customer service roles
- Data analytics internships in Dublin
- Graduate roles in Business Analytics
- Freelance data projects
:::

:::

---

## Professional References {.text-left}

::: {.callout-note}
References available upon request. Please contact me via email or LinkedIn to request a reference letter or direct contact details.
:::


## Let’s Connect {.text-right}

The fastest way to reach me is via **email** at [ananyam461@gmail.com](mailto:ananyam461@gmail.com) or connect with me on **LinkedIn**.

::: {.callout-important}
## Response Time
I typically respond to messages within **24–48 hours**. I look forward to hearing from you!
:::

---
